info.title: VS Service API
info.description: gRPC service with a REST gateway (grpc-gateway) for the LastHearth backend. A single protobuf source generates both the gRPC and REST APIs.

patch.summary: Admin update of settlement diplomacy status. Requires settlements:manage scope.
patch.description:
Errors:
   - NOT_FOUND (404): settlement not found
   - PERMISSION_DENIED (403): missing settlements:manage scope
   - UNAUTHENTICATED (401): missing or invalid auth token
   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

get.summary: Player: get the caller's current coin balance.
get.description:
Errors:
   - UNAUTHENTICATED (401): missing or invalid auth token
   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

get.summary: Player: list the caller's own purchases.
get.description:
Errors:
   - UNAUTHENTICATED (401): missing or invalid auth token
   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

get.summary: Admin: get a player's current coin balance.
get.description:
Returns 0 coins if the wallet does not exist yet.

 Errors:
   - UNAUTHENTICATED (401): missing or invalid auth token
   - PERMISSION_DENIED (403): insufficient privileges
   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

post.summary: Admin: manually credit coins to a player's wallet.
post.description:
Errors:
   - INVALID_ARGUMENT (400): amount must be positive
   - UNAUTHENTICATED (401): missing or invalid auth token
   - PERMISSION_DENIED (403): insufficient privileges
   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

post.summary: Admin: manually deduct coins from a player's wallet.
post.description:
Errors:
   - INVALID_ARGUMENT (400): amount must be positive
   - NOT_FOUND (404): wallet not found
   - FAILED_PRECONDITION (412): insufficient funds
   - UNAUTHENTICATED (401): missing or invalid auth token
   - PERMISSION_DENIED (403): insufficient privileges
   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

get.summary: Admin: list all purchases for a player.
get.description:
Errors:

   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

get.summary: Admin: list all coin transactions for a player.
get.description:
Errors:

get.summary: Admin: list purchases that have not been marked as issued yet (pending manual delivery).
get.description:
Returns only active (non-refunded) purchases.

 Errors:
   - UNAUTHENTICATED (401): missing or invalid auth token
   - PERMISSION_DENIED (403): insufficient privileges
   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

post.summary: Admin: mark a purchase as manually issued by the calling admin.
post.description:
Idempotent — calling on an already-issued purchase returns the existing record unchanged.

 Errors:
   - NOT_FOUND (404): purchase not found
   - FAILED_PRECONDITION (412): purchase is refunded
   - UNAUTHENTICATED (401): missing or invalid auth token
   - PERMISSION_DENIED (403): insufficient privileges
   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

post.summary: Admin: refund a purchase — restores coins to the player's wallet.
post.description:
Errors:
   - NOT_FOUND (404): purchase not found
   - FAILED_PRECONDITION (412): already refunded
   - UNAUTHENTICATED (401): missing or invalid auth token
   - PERMISSION_DENIED (403): insufficient privileges
   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

get.summary: Player: list all available shop items.

Errors:

get.summary: Returns the current season leaderboard sorted by ELO descending.

Errors:

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of entries. Defaults to 25.

post.summary: Records a match result and recalculates ELO for all participants.
post.description:
Requires an active season.

 Errors:
   - INVALID_ARGUMENT (400): fewer than 2 players, duplicate places, or no active season
   - UNAUTHENTICATED (401): missing or invalid auth token
   - PERMISSION_DENIED (403): insufficient privileges
   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

post.summary: Creates a new season. Fails if a season is already active.
post.description:
Errors:
   - ALREADY_EXISTS (409): active season already exists
   - UNAUTHENTICATED (401): missing or invalid auth token
   - PERMISSION_DENIED (403): insufficient privileges
   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

post.summary: Distributes season rewards to top-N players and closes the current season.
post.description:
Archives the leaderboard. Does NOT create a new season.

 Errors:
   - NOT_FOUND (404): no active season
   - UNAUTHENTICATED (401): missing or invalid auth token
   - PERMISSION_DENIED (403): insufficient privileges
   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

get.summary: Returns a paginated list of all seasons, newest first.
get.description:
Errors:

get.description:
For an active season returns current live stats (rank = 0).
 For a completed season returns the archived result including rank and reward.

get.summary: List leaderboard entries sorted by the specified filter.
get.description:
Defaults to 25 entries if limit is not specified.

 Errors:
   - INVALID_ARGUMENT (400): unknown filter value
   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Leaderboard filter. Service will return entries sorted by provided filter.

schema.title: filter
schema.description: Leaderboard filter. Service will return entries sorted by provided filter.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description:
The maximum number of entries to return.
 If unspecified, 25 entry will be returned.

schema.title: limit
schema.description:
The maximum number of entries to return.
 If unspecified, 25 entry will be returned.

post.summary: Returns N presigned POST targets for uploading images.
post.description:
The required scope depends on the purpose (see the server-side per-purpose config).

 Errors:
   - INVALID_ARGUMENT (400): unknown purpose, count out of [1,20], or unsupported content_type
   - UNAUTHENTICATED (401)
   - PERMISSION_DENIED (403)
   - INTERNAL (500)

get.summary: List news with pagination. View count is incremented for each item returned.
get.description:
Default page size is 15, maximum is 50.

 Errors:
   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description:
The maximum number of news to return. The service may return fewer than
 this value.
 If unspecified, at most 15 news will be returned.
 The maximum value is 50; values above 50 will be coerced to 50.

schema.title: page_size
schema.description:
The maximum number of news to return. The service may return fewer than
 this value.
 If unspecified, at most 15 news will be returned.
 The maximum value is 50; values above 50 will be coerced to 50.

parameters.name: page_token
parameters.description:
A page token, received from a previous `ListBooks` call.
 Provide this to retrieve the subsequent page.

 When paginating, all other parameters provided to `ListBooks` must match
 the call that provided the page token.

schema.title: page_token
schema.description:
A page token, received from a previous `ListBooks` call.
 Provide this to retrieve the subsequent page.

 When paginating, all other parameters provided to `ListBooks` must match
 the call that provided the page token.

post.summary: Create a news entry. Requires admin privileges.
post.description:
Preview image is stored as WebP. Broadcasts a notification to all users.

 Errors:
   - UNAUTHENTICATED (401): missing or invalid auth token
   - PERMISSION_DENIED (403): insufficient privileges
   - INTERNAL (500): storage or database failure

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the news item to retrieve.

parameters.description: The unique identifier of the news item to delete.

get.summary: Lists notifications for the authenticated user with pagination.
get.description:
Default page size is 15, maximum is 15.
 Supports order_by: "created_at" or "state" with optional " asc"/" desc" suffix.

 Errors:
   - NOT_FOUND (404): no notifications found for user
   - UNAUTHENTICATED (401): missing or invalid auth token
   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description:
The maximum number of notifications to return. The service may return fewer
 than this value. If unspecified, at most 15 notifications will be returned.
 The maximum value is 15; values above 15 will be coerced to 15.

schema.title: page_size
schema.description:
The maximum number of notifications to return. The service may return fewer
 than this value. If unspecified, at most 15 notifications will be returned.
 The maximum value is 15; values above 15 will be coerced to 15.

parameters.name: page_token
parameters.description: A token identifying a page of results the server should return.

schema.title: page_token
schema.description: A token identifying a page of results the server should return.

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description:
The field to sort by, followed by direction (e.g., "created_at desc" or "state asc").
 Supported fields: "created_at", "state". If unspecified, defaults to "created_at desc".

schema.title: order_by
schema.description:
The field to sort by, followed by direction (e.g., "created_at desc" or "state asc").
 Supported fields: "created_at", "state". If unspecified, defaults to "created_at desc".

   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

Errors:

get.description:
Errors:

   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

post.summary: Update the avatar for a user. Caller must match user_id.
post.description:
Avatar must be at most 3MB and exactly 512x512 pixels; converted to WebP internally.

 Errors:
   - INVALID_ARGUMENT (400): avatar is empty; exceeds 3MB; invalid dimensions (must be 512x512)
   - PERMISSION_DENIED (403): cannot update another user's avatar
   - UNAUTHENTICATED (401): missing or invalid auth token
   - INTERNAL (500): image processing, storage, or SSO failure

get.summary: List all kit assignments for a specific user. Caller must match user_id.
get.description:
Errors:
   - PERMISSION_DENIED (403): cannot list assignments for another user
   - UNAUTHENTICATED (401): missing or invalid auth token
   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

put.summary: Change in-game nickname for a user. Caller must match user_id.
put.description:
Nickname must be 1-15 alphanumeric/underscore/dash characters.
 Change is subject to a 6-month cooldown per user.

 Errors:
   - INVALID_ARGUMENT (400): invalid nickname format; new nickname same as current
   - PERMISSION_DENIED (403): cannot change another user's nickname
   - FAILED_PRECONDITION (400): nickname change on cooldown; response includes next allowed date
   - UNAUTHENTICATED (401): missing or invalid auth token
   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

get.summary: Get settlement by user ID.
get.description:
Errors:
   - NOT_FOUND (404): settlement not found for user
   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

get.summary: Get all invitations belonging to a specific user. Caller must match user_id.
get.description:
Errors:

   - UNAUTHENTICATED (401): missing or invalid auth token
   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

post.summary: Submit a verification request for the authenticated user.
post.description:
If a previous request exists and is re-submittable, it will be updated.

 Errors:
   - FAILED_PRECONDITION (400): verification is pending or already approved/verified
   - ALREADY_EXISTS (409): user is already verified
   - UNAUTHENTICATED (401): missing or invalid auth token
   - INTERNAL (500): database or SSO failure

get.summary: Get verification details for the authenticated user.
get.description:
Possible statuses: pending, approved, rejected, verified.

 Errors:
   - NOT_FOUND (404): no verification request found for user
   - UNAUTHENTICATED (401): missing or invalid auth token
   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

post.summary: Approve a user's verification request. Requires admin privileges.
post.description:
Grants the "player" role to the user in SSO.

 Errors:
   - FAILED_PRECONDITION (400): verification is not in pending state
   - NOT_FOUND (404): verification request not found
   - ALREADY_EXISTS (409): user is already verified
   - UNAUTHENTICATED (401): missing or invalid auth token
   - PERMISSION_DENIED (403): insufficient privileges
   - INTERNAL (500): database or SSO failure

post.summary: Reject a user's verification request. Requires admin privileges.
post.description:
Errors:
   - FAILED_PRECONDITION (400): verification is not in pending state
   - NOT_FOUND (404): verification request not found
   - UNAUTHENTICATED (401): missing or invalid auth token
   - PERMISSION_DENIED (403): insufficient privileges
   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

   - INTERNAL (500): database failure

donate.v1.Privilege.title: Privilege
donate.v1.Privilege.description: Privilege describes a perk granted by the item (e.g. colored nick, Discord role).

code.title: code
code.description: Unique identifier used to correlate the item with in-game assets.

image_url.title: image_url
image_url.description: Leave empty to keep the existing image.

google.protobuf.FloatValue.description:
Wrapper message for `float`.

 The JSON representation for `FloatValue` is JSON number.

red.title: red
red.description: The amount of red in the color as a value in the interval [0, 1].

green.title: green
green.description: The amount of green in the color as a value in the interval [0, 1].

blue.title: blue
blue.description: The amount of blue in the color as a value in the interval [0, 1].

alpha.title: alpha
alpha.description:
The fraction of this color that should be applied to the pixel. That is,
 the final pixel color is defined by the equation:

   `pixel color = alpha * (this color) + (1.0 - alpha) * (background color)`

 This means that a value of 1.0 corresponds to a solid color, whereas
 a value of 0.0 corresponds to a completely transparent color. This
 uses a wrapper message rather than a simple float scalar so that it is
 possible to distinguish between a default value and the value being unset.
 If omitted, this color object is rendered as a solid color
 (as if the alpha value had been explicitly given a value of 1.0).

google.type.Color.title: Color

limit.title: limit
limit.description: Maximum number of entries. Defaults to 25.

next.description: Cursor from a previous response for pagination.

hungergames.v1.PlayerMatchResult.title: PlayerMatchResult
hungergames.v1.PlayerMatchResult.description: PlayerMatchResult represents a single player's result in a match.

ended_at.title: ended_at
ended_at.description: Absent if the season is still active.

hungergames.v1.SeasonResultEntry.title: SeasonResultEntry
hungergames.v1.SeasonResultEntry.description: SeasonResultEntry is the archived standing of a player at the end of a season.

hungergames.v1.SeasonReward.title: SeasonReward
hungergames.v1.SeasonReward.description: SeasonReward maps a leaderboard rank to a coin reward amount.

kit.v1.AssignKitToUserResponse.description: Response for successful assignment of a kit to a user

kit.v1.GetAvailableKitsRequest.title: GetAvailableKitsRequest
kit.v1.GetAvailableKitsRequest.description: Request for getting all available kits

filter.title: filter
filter.description: Leaderboard filter. Service will return entries sorted by provided filter.

limit.title: limit
limit.description:
The maximum number of entries to return.
 If unspecified, 25 entry will be returned.

purpose.title: purpose
purpose.description: Must be a defined purpose other than UNSPECIFIED.

count.title: count
count.description: Number of presigned targets to issue. Allowed range: [1, 20].

content_type.title: content_type
content_type.description:
Optional. MIME type of the uploaded file; must be in the list allowed for
 the purpose. Empty → any image/* is allowed and the object gets a .webp extension.

media.v1.UploadPurpose.title: UploadPurpose
media.v1.UploadPurpose.description:
UploadPurpose maps to a concrete bucket on the server side.
 The client never passes a bucket name directly (guards against writing to arbitrary buckets).

post_url.title: post_url
post_url.description: POST endpoint: the client sends multipart/form-data (fields + file).

fields.title: fields
fields.description: Form fields to send together with the file (policy, signature, key, ...).

public_url.title: public_url
public_url.description: Public URL of the object after upload — the client passes it to the target domain.

id.title: id
id.description: The unique identifier of the news item to delete.

id.title: id
id.description: The unique identifier of the news item to retrieve.

page_size.title: page_size
page_size.description:
The maximum number of news to return. The service may return fewer than
 this value.
 If unspecified, at most 15 news will be returned.
 The maximum value is 50; values above 50 will be coerced to 50.

page_token.title: page_token
page_token.description:
A page token, received from a previous `ListBooks` call.
 Provide this to retrieve the subsequent page.

 When paginating, all other parameters provided to `ListBooks` must match
 the call that provided the page token.

next_page_token.title: next_page_token
next_page_token.description:
A token, which can be sent as `page_token` to retrieve the next page.
 If this field is omitted, there are no subsequent pages.

page_size.title: page_size
page_size.description:
The maximum number of notifications to return. The service may return fewer
 than this value. If unspecified, at most 15 notifications will be returned.
 The maximum value is 15; values above 15 will be coerced to 15.

page_token.title: page_token
page_token.description: A token identifying a page of results the server should return.

order_by.title: order_by
order_by.description:
The field to sort by, followed by direction (e.g., "created_at desc" or "state asc").
 Supported fields: "created_at", "state". If unspecified, defaults to "created_at desc".

next_page_token.title: next_page_token
next_page_token.description:
A token to retrieve the next page of results. Empty if there are no more
 results.

id.title: id
id.description:
The identifier of the notification to mark as read.
 Required.

notification.v1.Notification.State.title: State
notification.v1.Notification.State.description: The state of the notification (e.g., unread or read).

count.title: count
count.description: Count of questions to return, if not specified, returns 5 questions

rules.v1.ListQuestionsResponse.Question.title: Question
rules.v1.ListQuestionsResponse.Question.description: Represents a question about rules with admin details

settlement.v1.AddTagToSettlementRequest.title: AddTagToSettlementRequest
settlement.v1.AddTagToSettlementRequest.description: Request to add a tag to a settlement

settlement.v1.AddTagToSettlementResponse.title: AddTagToSettlementResponse
settlement.v1.AddTagToSettlementResponse.description: Response from adding a tag to a settlement

settlement.v1.RemoveTagFromSettlementReq.title: RemoveTagFromSettlementRequest
settlement.v1.RemoveTagFromSettlementReq.description: Request to remove a tag from a settlement

settlement.v1.RemoveTagFromSettlementRes.title: RemoveTagFromSettlementResponse
settlement.v1.RemoveTagFromSettlementRes.description: Response from removing a tag from a settlement

settlement.v1.TagReference.title: TagReference
settlement.v1.TagReference.description: Reference to tag in other messages

filter.title: filter
filter.description: Stats filter. Service will return count sorted by provided filter.

stats.v1.OnlineStatsRequest.StatsFilter.title: StatsFilter
stats.v1.OnlineStatsRequest.StatsFilter.description: Different filter for sorting values, if unspecified returns data filter by day

tags.name: DonateService
tags.description: Donate service — player wallet, shop, and manual coin management.

tags.name: HungerGamesService
tags.description:
HungerGamesService manages the Hunger Games game mode: ELO ratings,
 season lifecycle, leaderboard, and reward distribution.

tags.name: KitService
tags.description: Kit service for managing game kit assignment to users

tags.name: MediaService
tags.description: MediaService issues presigned POST targets for direct uploads to S3.

tags.name: NotificationService
tags.description: Provides methods to manage user notifications
